entry.title: New: CR 25-83 (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
Recommending FIRST READING of Bill 170, CD1 (2025), to establish an income-based real property tax credit of up to $10,000 for qualified homeowners whose prior year’s real property taxes exceed: 1) two percent of household income; or 2) the minimum tax in the annual budget ordinance, subject to eligibility conditions.

Special Committee on Real Property Tax Reform

View on the council site
